case_title: DAVID LLEWELLYN TROTMAN VS. HOLLIS COURT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-22-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIS COURT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TROTMAN, DAVID LLEWELLYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOLLIS COURT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOLLIS COURT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-11-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. THIS CASE IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING ON THE ISSUE OF THE PARTIES RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE COST OF REPAIR UNDER THE RULES OF THE HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION. THE PARTIES SHALL PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A COMPLETE SET OF HOA RULES, OR CCR'S AT THE TIME OF HEARING. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).(PLAINTIFF'S WHITE EXHIBIT BINDER LOCATED IN ROOM 103, SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT).
